input.headline: This painting is the most expensive work of modern art ever sold at auction

raw.headline: This painting is the most expensive work of modern art ever sold at auction

winner: Why did the painting apply for a job at an auction house? Because it heard they were always looking for the most expensive work of modern art.

candidates.text: Why did the painting apply for a job at an auction house? Because it heard they were always looking for the most expensive work of modern art.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the pun on 'most expensive work of modern art,' but it's a bit generic and relies heavily on the headline for setup. It lacks surprise and specificity."}

candidates.text: Why did the painting decide to go pro? Because it was tired of being hung up on being an auction failure.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with wordplay on 'hung up' and 'auction failure,' but it's a bit forced and lacks the punch needed for maximum humor. It also doesn't fully tie into the headline's emphasis on being the most expensive."}

candidates.text: Why was the pricey modern artwork feeling down at the auction? Because it knew it couldn't outrun its high value.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the wordplay on 'high value,' but it's a bit generic and lacks specificity to the headline. The humor is mild and not strongly tied to the context of the most expensive artwork."}

candidates.text: Why don't paintings ever feel blue about their value? Because they always sell at high prices!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 4.5, "reason": "The joke is generic and relies on a tired pun rather than being specific to the headline. It lacks surprise and does not effectively tie into the context of the most expensive painting."}

candidates.text: Why did the painting decide to go to auction? It heard there was a lot going on there.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 3.5, "reason": "Lacks surprise and specificity; the joke is generic and relies on a weak pun."}
